## Type

- [ ] FEAT: new user-facing behavior
- [ ] FIX: bug fix
- [ ] DOCS: documentation-only change
- [ ] CHORE: maintenance, tooling, or cleanup
- [ ] HOTFIX: urgent production fix
- [ ] REFACTOR: behavior-preserving code change
- [ ] TEST: test-only change

- What changed:
- Why it changed:
- Main files touched:

- [ ] UI
- [ ] State/localStorage
- [ ] Core logic
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling/automation

- Before:
- After:

## Verification

- [ ] Ran core tests
- [ ] Ran smoke test
- [ ] Checked the app in a browser
- [ ] Checked mobile/narrow layout if UI changed
- [ ] Updated documentation if commands or behavior changed

## Risk And Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Known risks:
- Rollback plan:

## Notes For Codex

- Keep changes focused.
- Mention any skipped verification with a reason.
- Do not mark browser verification complete if Browser MCP was unavailable and only manual checks were done.
